questionHtml: Explain why Si has a smaller atomic radius than Al.
markschemeHtml:
nuclear charge/number of protons/Z/Zeff increases «causing a stronger pull on the outer electrons» ✓

same number of shells/«outer» energy level/shielding ✓

meta.title: Explain why Si has a smaller atomic radius than Al.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
